login.title: Yazıhane
login.slogan: "Manage your business with <1>v3rii</1>, not with guesses."
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please login again.
login.heroBadge: V3RII SalesDesk · Customer, stock, sales, invoice and field operations in one platform
login.heroTagline: End-to-end sales management from field to office for businesses in Turkey.
login.heroTitle: Your entire business flow in one
login.heroDescription: Unify every process from quote to invoice, stock to visit forms on a single screen. One data source for the team, real-time visibility for management.
login.flowTitle: End-to-end flow from sales to field
login.flowSubtitle: Modules work together; data is collected in one hub.
login.diff2: Visit forms, reports and weekly plans together
login.diff3: Live rates, notifications and team permissions

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to reset your password. We will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox (including spam).
forgotPassword.failed: The request could not be completed. Check your email address and try again.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send the password reset request. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid or missing token. Please check the password reset link again.
resetPassword.successRedirect: Şifreniz başarıyla sıfırlandı. Giriş ekranına yönlendiriliyorsunuz...
resetPassword.error: Şifre sıfırlama işlemi sırasında bir hata oluştu.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.newPasswordMaxLength: New password must be at most 100 characters
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as current password
